name: Peppy Cocktail Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, melt butter.
2. Add remaining ingredients except nuts to the melted butter and stir until well blended.
3. Add the walnut or pecan halves and toss to coat evenly.
4. Cover the pan and cook over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Drain any excess oil on brown paper.
6. Store in an airtight container.
